author: mark
text:
Mirror GH title/body edits back to balls task fields

Extends the issues-plugin pull half from close-only to full content mirror. Push records the title and an FNV-1a-64 hex body hash in the projection; sync compares those against the live GH issue to decide who moved, mirrors GH-only edits, and emits an add_note (no field overwrite) when both sides edited. Each emitted SyncUpdate refreshes the projection so a second sync against unchanged GH state is a noop, closing the echo loop one tier higher.

Adds SyncUpdate.external to balls-github-shared to match core's wire shape so the plugin can rewrite its own projection without core-side merge changes.
